basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 24 April 2026 on the official website of NIT Warangal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation applicable as per institute rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Agricultural Engineering with First class, M.E./M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering and Allied specializations with First Class, GATE Qualification (Desirable), Hydrological Modelling (Desirable), Programming skills in R/Python/MATLAB (Desirable), Good analytical ability and competency in writing skills (Desirable)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: Essential: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Agricultural Engineering with First class; M.E./M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering and Allied specializations with First Class. Desirable: GATE Qualification; Hydrological Modelling; Programming skills in R/Python/MATLAB; Good analytical ability and competency in writing skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the JRF post at the National Institute of Technology Warangal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech in Civil or Agricultural Engineering (First Class) and M.E./M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering or allied specializations (First Class).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 30 years, with age relaxation applicable as per institute rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs 37,000/- to Rs 42,000/-.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which can be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the JRF position at NIT Warangal must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any desirable qualifications for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable qualifications include GATE qualification, knowledge of Hydrological Modelling, programming skills in R/Python/MATLAB, and good analytical and writing skills.
